questions.question: What is the difference between compilation and interpretation?
questions.goodAnswer: Compilation translates source code into machine code creating an executable file. Interpretation translates and executes code line by line without an executable.
questions.role: General Programming
questions.sourceDataset: Software Engineering Interview Questions Dataset.zip/Software Questions.csv

questions.question: Explain the concept of polymorphism.
questions.goodAnswer: Polymorphism allows objects of different classes to be treated as objects of a common superclass, enabling method overriding.
questions.role: General Programming
questions.sourceDataset: Software Engineering Interview Questions Dataset.zip/Software Questions.csv

questions.question: Define encapsulation and give an example.
questions.goodAnswer: Encapsulation bundles data and methods in a class, restricting direct data access. Example: class with private data and public methods.
questions.role: General Programming
questions.sourceDataset: Software Engineering Interview Questions Dataset.zip/Software Questions.csv

questions.question: What is an abstract class, and how is it different from an interface?
questions.goodAnswer: An abstract class can't be instantiated and can have abstract and concrete methods. An interface only has method signatures without implementations.
questions.role: General Programming
questions.sourceDataset: Software Engineering Interview Questions Dataset.zip/Software Questions.csv

questions.question: Describe the principles of Object-Oriented Programming (OOP).
questions.goodAnswer: OOP principles include encapsulation, inheritance, polymorphism, and abstraction, promoting organized and maintainable code.
questions.role: General Programming
questions.sourceDataset: Software Engineering Interview Questions Dataset.zip/Software Questions.csv

questions.question: What is the purpose of a constructor?
questions.goodAnswer: A constructor initializes object properties upon class instantiation, ensuring a well-defined state.
questions.role: General Programming
questions.sourceDataset: Software Engineering Interview Questions Dataset.zip/Software Questions.csv

questions.question: Explain the difference between stack and heap memory.
questions.goodAnswer: Stack memory stores local variables and function calls; heap memory is for dynamic allocation. Stack operates in LIFO, heap managed manually or by garbage collection.
questions.role: General Programming
questions.sourceDataset: Software Engineering Interview Questions Dataset.zip/Software Questions.csv

questions.question: What is a design pattern, and can you name a few?
questions.goodAnswer: Design patterns are solutions to common design problems. Examples: Singleton, Factory, Observer, MVC.
questions.role: General Programming
questions.sourceDataset: Software Engineering Interview Questions Dataset.zip/Software Questions.csv

questions.question: Define the term "DRY" in software development.

questions.question: What does ML stand for?
questions.role: Machine Learning

questions.question: Which type of ML uses labeled data?
questions.role: Supervised

questions.question: Which type of ML uses unlabeled data?
questions.role: Unsupervised

questions.question: In reinforcement learning, the agent learns through:
questions.role: Rewards and penalties

questions.question: What is overfitting?
questions.role: Model performs well on training but poorly on test data

questions.question: What is underfitting?
questions.role: Model fails to capture patterns

questions.question: What is the bias-variance tradeoff?
questions.role: Reducing bias increases variance and vice versa

questions.question: Which metric measures proportion of correct predictions?
questions.role: Accuracy

questions.question: Precision = ?
questions.role: TP/(TP+FP)

questions.question: Recall = ?
questions.role: TP/(TP+FN)

questions.question: F1-Score is:
questions.role: Harmonic mean of Precision and Recall

questions.question: What does AUC-ROC measure?
questions.role: Model's ability to distinguish classes

questions.question: Cross-validation helps in:
questions.role: Robust model evaluation

questions.question: What is k-fold cross-validation?
questions.role: Data split into k equal parts; each used as validation once

questions.question: Purpose of a validation set:
questions.role: Tune hyperparameters during training

questions.question: L1 regularization is:
questions.role: Lasso

questions.question: L2 regularization is:
questions.role: Ridge

questions.question: Dropout in neural networks:
questions.role: Prevents overfitting

questions.question: Feature engineering means:
questions.role: Creating/transforming features to improve model

questions.question: What is a hyperparameter?
questions.role: Set before training; not learned

questions.question: Gradient descent minimizes:
questions.role: Loss function

questions.question: Learning rate controls:
questions.role: Step size in parameter updates

questions.question: Batch gradient descent:
questions.role: Uses entire dataset per update

questions.question: SGD (Stochastic Gradient Descent):
questions.role: Uses one sample per update

questions.question: Mini-batch GD uses:
questions.role: A subset per update

questions.question: Vanishing gradient problem:
questions.role: Gradients too small to update early layers

questions.question: Most common hidden layer activation in deep nets:
questions.role: ReLU

questions.question: Softmax used in output for:
questions.role: Multiclass classification

questions.question: KNN default distance metric:
questions.role: Euclidean

questions.question: 'K' in KNN represents:
questions.role: Number of nearest neighbors

questions.question: KNN is an example of:
questions.role: Lazy learning

questions.question: SVM finds:
questions.role: Optimal hyperplane maximizing margin

questions.question: Kernel trick in SVM:
questions.role: Non-linear classification in transformed space

questions.question: Naive Bayes assumes:
questions.role: Features conditionally independent given class

questions.question: Random Forest is ensemble of:
questions.role: Decision Trees

questions.question: Boosting trains models to:
questions.role: Correct errors of previous models

questions.question: XGBoost stands for:
questions.role: Extreme Gradient Boosting

questions.question: Bagging reduces:
questions.role: Variance

questions.question: Confusion matrix summarizes:
questions.role: Classification performance via TP/FP/TN/FN

questions.question: False Positive (FP) is also called:
questions.role: Type I error

questions.question: False Negative (FN) is also called:
questions.role: Type II error

questions.question: Best metric for imbalanced datasets:
questions.role: F1-Score or AUC-ROC

questions.question: Data normalization:
questions.role: Scales features to same range

questions.question: Min-Max scaling range:
Z-score standardization produces:
questions.role: Mean 0, std 1

questions.question: Isolation Forest is used for:
questions.role: Anomaly detection

questions.question: Transfer learning:
questions.role: Reuses pre-trained model for new tasks

questions.question: Dimensionality reduction:
questions.role: Reduces features while retaining info

questions.question: PCA is a ___ dimensionality reduction technique:
questions.role: Linear

questions.question: t-SNE is primarily for:
questions.role: Data visualization in 2D/3D

questions.question: GAN consists of:
questions.role: Generator and Discriminator

questions.question: Generator's goal in GAN:
questions.role: Fool the discriminator

questions.question: Elbow Method is used for:
questions.role: Optimal number of clusters

questions.question: Silhouette score evaluates:
questions.role: Cluster quality

questions.question: DBSCAN doesn't require specifying:
questions.role: Number of clusters

questions.question: K-Means assigns clusters by:
questions.role: Distance to centroids

questions.question: Hierarchical clustering produces:
questions.role: A dendrogram

questions.question: Association rule mining finds:
questions.role: Co-occurring items in transactions

questions.question: Apriori mines:
questions.role: Frequent itemsets

questions.question: Support in association rules:
questions.role: Frequency of itemset in dataset

questions.question: Confidence in association rules:
questions.role: P(B|A)

questions.question: Lift > 1 indicates:
questions.role: Positive correlation between items

questions.question: MSE is used for:
questions.role: Regression evaluation

questions.question: R² = 1 means:
questions.role: Perfect fit

questions.question: Negative R² means:
questions.role: Model worse than horizontal baseline

questions.question: RMSE penalizes:
questions.role: Large errors more than MAE

questions.question: Learning curve shows:
questions.role: Model performance vs training data size

questions.question: Grid search:
questions.role: Finds best hyperparameter combination exhaustively

questions.question: Random search is better than grid search when:
questions.role: Search space is very large

questions.question: Bayesian optimization uses:
questions.role: Prior knowledge + likelihood

questions.question: Feature importance in Random Forest:
questions.role: Mean decrease in impurity

questions.question: Logistic Regression output:
questions.role: Probability between 0 and 1

questions.question: Sigmoid function maps to:
One-hot encoding:
questions.role: Encodes categorical variables as binary vectors

questions.question: Label encoding:
questions.role: Assigns integers to categories

questions.question: Data leakage:
questions.role: Test set info leaks into training

questions.question: Stratified sampling:
questions.role: Preserves class distribution in samples

questions.question: Time series should be split:
questions.role: By time order, not randomly

questions.question: No Free Lunch theorem:
questions.role: No single algorithm best for all problems

questions.question: Occam's Razor in ML:
questions.role: Prefer simpler models if they explain data well

questions.question: Most interpretable algorithm:
questions.role: Decision Tree

questions.question: Early stopping:
questions.role: Stops training when validation loss increases

questions.question: Most popular traditional ML library in Python:
questions.role: scikit-learn

questions.question: fit() in scikit-learn:
questions.role: Trains the model on data

questions.question: predict() in scikit-learn:
questions.role: Generates predictions on new data

questions.question: score() in scikit-learn returns:
questions.role: Accuracy (classifiers) or R² (regressors)

questions.question: What is the purpose of scikit-learn's Pipeline?
questions.role: Chains preprocessing and model steps

questions.question: A model with low training error but high test error is:
questions.role: Overfitting

questions.question: A model with high training AND test error is:
questions.role: Underfitting

questions.question: Which of these is a distance-based algorithm?
questions.role: KNN

questions.question: Which algorithm works best with high-dimensional sparse data?
questions.role: Naive Bayes

questions.question: What is the curse of dimensionality?

questions.role: Two correlated variables don't necessarily have causal relationship

questions.question: What is covariance?
questions.role: Measure of joint variability of two variables

questions.question: What is standard deviation?
questions.role: Square root of variance; measure of spread

questions.question: What is a null hypothesis?
questions.role: Statement of no effect or no difference being tested

questions.question: What is statistical inference?
questions.role: Drawing conclusions about populations from sample data

questions.question: What is random variable?
questions.role: Variable whose value is determined by random process

questions.question: Discrete vs continuous random variable:
questions.role: Discrete: countable values; Continuous: any value in range

questions.question: Expected value E[X]:
questions.role: Weighted average of all possible values

questions.question: Variance Var[X]:
questions.role: E[(X-μ)²] — expected squared deviation from mean

questions.question: What is the normal distribution?
questions.role: Bell-shaped symmetric distribution defined by mean and std dev

questions.question: What is the binomial distribution?
questions.role: Distribution of number of successes in n independent Bernoulli trials

questions.question: What is the Poisson distribution?
questions.role: Distribution of number of events in fixed interval when events are rare

questions.question: What is the uniform distribution?
questions.role: All outcomes equally likely

questions.question: What is a confidence interval?
questions.role: Range likely containing true parameter value at given confidence level

questions.question: 95% confidence interval means:
questions.role: If experiment repeated many times, 95% of CIs would contain true value

questions.question: What is Simpson's paradox?
questions.role: Trend appears in groups but reverses when groups combined

questions.question: What is survivorship bias?
questions.role: Focusing on survivors/successes while ignoring failures

questions.question: What is selection bias in ML?
questions.role: Training data not representative of deployment population

questions.question: What is sampling bias?
questions.role: Sample not randomly selected leading to unrepresentative data

questions.question: What is feature importance vs feature selection?
questions.role: Importance ranks features; selection chooses subset to keep

questions.question: What is mutual information?
questions.role: Measures statistical dependence between two variables

questions.question: What is entropy in information theory?
questions.role: Measure of uncertainty or information content

questions.question: What is KL divergence?
questions.role: Measures how one probability distribution differs from another

questions.question: What is the law of total probability?
questions.role: P(B) = Σ P(B|Aᵢ)P(Aᵢ) summed over all Aᵢ

questions.question: What is Occam's Razor?
questions.role: Simpler explanation preferred over complex when both fit the data

questions.question: What is the train-test gap?
questions.role: Difference between training and test performance (large gap = overfitting)

questions.question: What is model complexity?
questions.role: Capacity of model to fit complex patterns (related to parameters)

questions.question: What is capacity in ML?
questions.role: Model's ability to fit a wide variety of functions

questions.question: What is inductive bias?
questions.role: Assumptions made by algorithm to generalize beyond training data

questions.question: What is frequentist vs Bayesian statistics?
questions.role: Frequentist uses long-run frequencies; Bayesian uses prior beliefs + data

questions.question: What is a statistical model?
questions.role: Mathematical description of data-generating process

questions.question: What is the likelihood function?
questions.role: P(data | parameters) — probability of data given parameter values

questions.question: What is a sufficient statistic?
questions.role: Contains all information about parameter that data has

questions.question: What is a point estimate?
questions.role: Single value estimate of population parameter

questions.question: What is method of moments estimation?
questions.role: Equates sample moments to population moments to estimate parameters

questions.question: What is leave-one-out cross-validation (LOOCV)?
questions.role: Each sample used once as test; rest as train

questions.question: What is bootstrap aggregating (bagging)?
questions.role: Training models on bootstrapped samples and aggregating

questions.question: What is bootstrapping statistically?
questions.role: Resampling with replacement from dataset to estimate statistics

questions.question: Monte Carlo simulation:
questions.role: Using random sampling to estimate numerical results

questions.question: What is Markov property?
questions.role: Future state depends only on current state, not history

questions.question: What is a Markov chain?
questions.role: Sequence of states where each depends only on previous state

questions.question: What is stationarity in time series?
questions.role: Statistical properties (mean, variance) constant over time

questions.question: Autocorrelation in time series:
questions.role: Correlation of a series with its own lagged values

questions.question: What is seasonality?
questions.role: Periodic fluctuations recurring at regular intervals

questions.question: What is trend in time series?
questions.role: Long-term increase or decrease in the data

questions.question: ARIMA stands for:
questions.role: AutoRegressive Integrated Moving Average

questions.question: What is the AR component of ARIMA?
questions.role: Uses past values to predict future values

questions.question: What is the MA component of ARIMA?
questions.role: Uses past forecast errors to improve predictions

questions.question: What is the I component of ARIMA?
questions.role: Number of differencing operations to make series stationary

questions.question: What is LSTM's advantage for time series?
questions.role: Can capture long-range dependencies better than vanilla RNN

questions.question: What is a stationary time series?
questions.role: Mean, variance, and covariance are constant over time

questions.question: What is augmented Dickey-Fuller test?
questions.role: Tests for presence of unit root (non-stationarity) in time series

questions.question: What is differencing in time series?
questions.role: Subtracting previous observation to remove trend/make stationary

questions.question: What is the Box-Jenkins methodology?
questions.role: Identify → Estimate → Diagnose ARIMA model steps

questions.question: What is cross-spectral analysis?
questions.role: Analyzing relationship between two time series in frequency domain

questions.question: What is forecasting horizon?
questions.role: Number of future time steps being predicted

questions.question: What is multi-step forecasting?
questions.role: Predicting multiple future time steps

questions.question: What is nowcasting?
questions.role: Predicting present or very near future using current data

questions.question: What is anomaly detection?
questions.role: Identifying data points significantly different from the norm

questions.question: What is a statistical process control (SPC)?
questions.role: Using statistical methods to monitor and control a process

questions.question: What is the Bonferroni correction?
questions.role: Adjusting significance threshold when making multiple comparisons

questions.question: What is the chi-square test?
questions.role: Tests independence between categorical variables

questions.question: What is ANOVA?
questions.role: Analysis of Variance — tests mean differences across 3+ groups

questions.question: What is t-test?
questions.role: Tests mean difference between two groups

questions.question: What is Mann-Whitney U test?
questions.role: Non-parametric test comparing two independent groups

questions.question: What is Kolmogorov-Smirnov test?
questions.role: Tests if samples come from same distribution or a specified one

questions.question: What is statistical learning theory?
questions.role: Theoretical framework studying conditions under which learning is possible

questions.question: What is PAC learning?
questions.role: Probably Approximately Correct — framework for learnability

questions.question: What is VC dimension?
questions.role: Measure of model complexity — maximum number of points it can shatter

questions.question: What is structural risk minimization?
questions.role: Balancing empirical risk and model complexity (VC theory)

questions.question: What is data preprocessing?
questions.role: Transforming raw data into clean, usable format for ML

questions.question: What is missing value imputation?
questions.role: Replacing missing values with estimated values

questions.question: Mean imputation:
questions.role: Replace missing values with feature mean

questions.question: Median imputation preferred when:
questions.role: Data has significant outliers

questions.question: Mode imputation is for:
questions.role: Categorical features

questions.question: KNN imputation:
questions.role: Replaces missing with weighted average of K nearest neighbors

questions.question: Multiple Imputation:
questions.role: Creates multiple imputed datasets and combines results for statistical validity

questions.question: MCAR (Missing Completely at Random):
questions.role: Missingness unrelated to observed or unobserved data

questions.question: MAR (Missing at Random):
questions.role: Missingness related to observed but not missing data itself

questions.question: MNAR (Missing Not at Random):
questions.role: Missingness related to the missing value itself

questions.question: What is outlier detection?
questions.role: Identifying data points far from the majority distribution

questions.question: IQR method for outliers:
questions.role: Points below Q1−1.5×IQR or above Q3+1.5×IQR are outliers

questions.question: Z-score method for outliers:
questions.role: Points with |z-score| > 3 typically considered outliers

questions.question: Isolation Forest detects outliers by:
questions.role: Isolating anomalies by randomly partitioning features

questions.question: Local Outlier Factor (LOF):
questions.role: Compares local density of point to its neighbors

questions.question: What is feature scaling?
questions.role: Transforming numerical features to similar range

questions.question: Min-Max normalization formula:
questions.role: (x − min)/(max − min)

questions.question: Z-score standardization formula:
questions.role: (x − μ)/σ

questions.question: MaxAbsScaler:
questions.role: Scales each feature by its maximum absolute value to [-1, 1]

questions.question: RobustScaler:
questions.role: Uses median and IQR, robust to outliers

questions.question: When to use StandardScaler:
questions.role: When features are normally distributed and outliers not extreme

questions.question: When to use RobustScaler:
questions.role: When data has significant outliers

questions.question: Tree-based models (RF, XGBoost) require feature scaling?
questions.role: No — they are scale invariant

questions.question: What is Label Encoding?
questions.role: Assigns integer values (0, 1, 2...) to categories

questions.question: Issue with Label Encoding for nominal categories:
questions.role: Implies ordinal relationship that doesn't exist

questions.question: One-hot encoding creates:
questions.role: Binary column for each category

questions.question: Issue with one-hot encoding for high-cardinality:
questions.role: Dimensionality explosion

questions.question: Target encoding:
questions.role: Replaces category with mean of target for that category

questions.question: Target encoding risk:
questions.role: Data leakage if done before train-test split

questions.question: Frequency encoding:
questions.role: Replaces category with its frequency (count) in the dataset

questions.question: Binary encoding:
questions.role: Encodes categories as binary (base-2) integers — reduces dimensions vs one-hot

questions.question: Hashing encoding:
questions.role: Maps categories to fixed-length binary vector using hash function

questions.question: What is Ordinal Encoding?
questions.role: Encodes ordered categories preserving their relative order

questions.question: What is the difference between Ordinal and Label Encoding?
questions.role: Ordinal preserves meaningful order; Label assigns arbitrary integers

questions.question: What is dimensionality reduction in preprocessing?
questions.role: Reducing number of features while preserving information

questions.question: What is feature selection vs extraction?
questions.role: Selection keeps existing features; extraction creates new ones

questions.question: Wrapper methods for feature selection:
questions.role: Train model on feature subsets; evaluate performance (e.g., RFE)

questions.question: Filter methods for feature selection:
questions.role: Use statistical measures independent of any model

questions.question: Embedded methods for feature selection:
questions.role: Feature selection during model training (e.g., Lasso, tree importance)

questions.question: Recursive Feature Elimination (RFE):
questions.role: Iteratively removes least important features based on model weights

questions.question: What is VIF and why it's used in preprocessing?
questions.role: Detects multicollinearity; remove features with high VIF (>5 or 10)

questions.question: What is PCA in preprocessing context?
questions.role: Transforms features to uncorrelated principal components

questions.question: What is log transformation used for?
questions.role: Reducing skewness in right-skewed distributions

questions.question: Box-Cox transformation:
questions.role: Power transformation to make distribution more normal

questions.question: Yeo-Johnson transformation:
questions.role: Like Box-Cox but handles zero and negative values

questions.question: What is binarization?
questions.role: Converting numerical features to 0/1 based on threshold

questions.question: What is discretization (binning)?
questions.role: Converting continuous features into categorical intervals

questions.question: Equal-width binning:
questions.role: Divides range into bins of equal width

questions.question: Equal-frequency binning (quantile):
questions.role: Each bin has roughly equal number of samples

questions.question: What is feature interaction?
questions.role: Capturing combined effect of two or more features

questions.question: Polynomial features:
questions.role: Creates interaction terms and higher-degree features

questions.question: What is data augmentation?
questions.role: Creating new training samples by transforming existing ones

questions.question: Common image augmentation techniques:
questions.role: Flip, rotate, crop, color jitter, zoom

questions.question: Text augmentation techniques:
questions.role: Synonym replacement, back translation, random insertion

questions.question: What is tokenization?
questions.role: Splitting text into words, subwords, or characters

questions.question: What is stemming?
questions.role: Reducing words to base/root form (e.g., running→run)

questions.question: What is lemmatization?
questions.role: Reducing words to dictionary base form using morphological analysis

questions.question: What are stop words?
questions.role: Common words (the, a, is) often removed as they add little meaning

questions.question: Bag of Words (BoW):
questions.role: Represents text as word count vector ignoring order

questions.question: What is word padding in NLP?
questions.role: Adding zeros/special tokens to make sequences equal length

questions.question: What is truncation in NLP?
questions.role: Cutting sequences to maximum length

questions.question: What is data pipeline?
questions.role: Automated sequence of data processing steps

questions.question: What is ETL (Extract, Transform, Load)?
questions.role: Process of extracting data, transforming it, loading to destination

questions.question: What is feature store?
questions.role: Centralized system to store, share, and serve ML features

questions.question: What is data versioning?
questions.role: Tracking changes to datasets over time (e.g., DVC)

questions.question: What is schema validation?
questions.role: Checking if data follows expected structure and types

questions.question: What is data drift?
questions.role: Statistical properties of input data change over time in production

questions.question: What is covariate shift?
questions.role: Distribution of input features changes between train and test/prod

questions.question: What is label noise?
questions.role: Incorrectly labeled training examples

questions.question: What is data cleaning?
questions.role: Correcting errors, removing duplicates, handling missing/outliers

questions.question: What is deduplication?
questions.role: Identifying and removing duplicate records

questions.question: What is type casting in data preprocessing?
questions.role: Converting data from one type to another (e.g., string to datetime)

questions.question: What is datetime feature extraction?
questions.role: Creating features from datetime (hour, day, month, weekday)

questions.question: Cyclical encoding for time features:
questions.role: Using sine and cosine to capture cyclical nature (e.g., hour of day)

questions.question: What is geospatial feature engineering?
questions.role: Creating features from lat/lon (distance, clustering, area)

questions.question: What is the Winsorization technique?
questions.role: Capping extreme values at specified percentiles

questions.question: What is data leakage in preprocessing?
questions.role: Information from future/test leaks into training via preprocessing

questions.question: How to prevent leakage in preprocessing?
questions.role: Fit preprocessing transformers only on training data

questions.question: What is the correct order: split then scale OR scale then split?
questions.role: Split first, then scale (fit on train only)

questions.question: What is image normalization?
questions.role: Dividing pixel values by 255 (or using mean/std) to scale to [0,1] or N(0,1)

questions.question: What is class weight balancing?
questions.role: Assigning higher loss weight to minority class during training

questions.question: What is corpus in NLP?
questions.role: Large collection of text data used for training/analysis

questions.question: What is vocabulary in NLP?
questions.role: Set of unique tokens in the dataset

questions.question: What is OOV (Out-of-Vocabulary) handling?
questions.role: Representing unknown words with special <UNK> token or subword tokenization

questions.question: What is subword tokenization (BPE)?
questions.role: Breaks rare words into common subword pieces to reduce OOV

questions.question: What is sentence embedding?
questions.role: Fixed-size vector representing entire sentence meaning

questions.question: What is data balancing?
questions.role: Adjusting class distribution to improve model fairness and performance

questions.question: What is Stratified K-Fold's role in preprocessing context?
questions.role: Ensures each fold has same class distribution as full dataset

questions.question: What is the purpose of a feature engineering pipeline?
questions.role: Automates reproducible, consistent feature transformations for train and test

questions.question: What is PCA whitening?
questions.role: PCA + scaling each component to unit variance

questions.question: What is model training?
questions.role: Adjusting model parameters to minimize loss function

questions.question: What is the training loop?
questions.role: Iterative process: forward pass → compute loss → backward pass → update weights

questions.question: What is the loss function's role?
questions.role: Measures how wrong model predictions are

questions.question: What is gradient?
questions.role: Vector of partial derivatives of loss w.r.t. each parameter

questions.question: What is weight update rule in gradient descent?
questions.role: w = w − lr × gradient

questions.question: What is local minimum in optimization?
questions.role: Point where loss is lower than nearby points but not globally lowest

questions.question: What is global minimum?
questions.role: Point where loss is absolutely lowest across all parameter values

questions.question: What is a saddle point?
questions.role: Point where gradient is zero but is neither min nor max

questions.question: Why does gradient descent struggle with saddle points in deep learning?
questions.role: Loss plateaus make learning very slow even though not converged

questions.question: What is learning rate warmup?
questions.role: Gradually increasing learning rate at start of training for stability

questions.question: Cosine annealing LR schedule:
questions.role: Decreases LR following cosine curve, possibly with warm restarts

questions.question: Step LR decay:
questions.role: Reduces LR by factor every N epochs

questions.question: Exponential LR decay:
questions.role: LR reduced by factor γ at every epoch: lr = lr₀ × γᵗ

questions.question: Reduce on Plateau:
questions.role: Reduces LR when a metric stops improving

questions.question: What is cyclic learning rate?
questions.role: Oscillates between min and max LR to escape local minima

questions.question: SGD with momentum update:
questions.role: v = βv + gradient; w = w − lr × v

questions.question: Momentum β=0.9 means:
questions.role: 90% past velocity + 10% current gradient contributes to update

questions.question: Nesterov momentum:
questions.role: Computes gradient at lookahead position (more accurate update)

questions.question: Adam optimizer:
questions.role: Combines momentum (first moment) and RMSprop (second moment)

questions.question: Adam hyperparameters:
questions.role: lr, β₁ (momentum), β₂ (RMSprop term), ε (numerical stability)

questions.question: AdaGrad limitation:
questions.role: LR monotonically decreases, eventually becoming too small

questions.question: What is gradient accumulation?
questions.role: Accumulating gradients over multiple batches before updating (simulates larger batch)

questions.question: What is gradient checkpointing?
questions.role: Saves memory by recomputing activations during backward pass instead of storing

questions.question: Mixed precision training (fp16):
questions.role: Using float16 for forward/backward; float32 for weight updates — speeds up + saves memory

questions.question: Automatic Mixed Precision (AMP):
questions.role: PyTorch/TF tool that automatically handles fp16/fp32 switching safely

questions.question: What is distributed training?
questions.role: Training model across multiple GPUs/machines

questions.question: Data parallelism:
questions.role: Same model on each GPU; different data batches; gradients averaged

questions.question: Model parallelism:
questions.role: Model split across GPUs (for models too large to fit one GPU)

questions.question: What is gradient synchronization in distributed training?
questions.role: Averaging gradients from all workers after each batch

questions.question: What is the forward pass?
questions.role: Input propagated through network to produce prediction

questions.question: What is the backward pass?
questions.role: Computing gradients via backpropagation through the network

questions.question: What is weight initialization's importance?
questions.role: Poor init can cause vanishing/exploding gradients, slow convergence

questions.question: Random initialization (Gaussian):
questions.role: Small random values from Gaussian distribution

questions.question: Zero initialization problem:
questions.role: All neurons learn identical features (symmetry breaking fails)

questions.question: What is the dead ReLU problem?
questions.role: Neurons permanently stuck outputting 0 due to negative activation

questions.question: How to fix dead ReLU?
questions.role: Use Leaky ReLU, PReLU, or ELU; careful weight init

questions.question: What is batch size effect on training?
questions.role: Larger batch: stable gradients, less regularization; Smaller: noisier, more regularizing

questions.question: Linear scaling rule for batch size:
questions.role: When multiplying batch size by k, multiply learning rate by k

questions.question: What is the loss landscape?
questions.role: High-dimensional surface of loss values over all parameter combinations

questions.question: What is loss curve (training curve)?
questions.role: Plot of training loss over epochs/iterations

questions.question: What does training loss decreasing but validation loss increasing indicate?
questions.role: Overfitting — model memorizing training data

questions.question: What is the warm-start technique?
questions.role: Initializing model with weights from a previous run

questions.question: What is curriculum learning?
questions.role: Training on easier examples first, gradually increasing difficulty

questions.question: What is self-paced learning?
questions.role: Model selects which samples to train on (starts with easy, adds hard)

questions.question: What is hard negative mining?
questions.role: Selecting difficult negative examples for more effective training

questions.question: What is class-balanced sampling?
questions.role: Drawing equal samples per class per batch during training

questions.question: What is weighted random sampling?
questions.role: Each sample drawn with probability proportional to its weight

questions.question: What is gradient norm?
questions.role: L2 norm of all gradients — used in gradient clipping

questions.question: Why monitor gradient norms during training?
questions.role: Detect exploding gradients and training instability

questions.question: What is loss masking?
questions.role: Ignoring loss contribution from padding tokens or irrelevant positions

questions.question: What is auxiliary loss?
questions.role: Additional loss term added to help training of intermediate representations

questions.question: What is multi-task learning?
questions.role: Training one model on multiple related tasks simultaneously

questions.question: What is pretraining?
questions.role: Training model on large general dataset before fine-tuning on task

questions.question: What is the difference between pretraining and fine-tuning?
questions.role: Pretraining on large data; fine-tuning adapts to specific task

questions.question: What is feature extraction (frozen layers)?
questions.role: Using pre-trained model as fixed feature extractor; only train top layers

questions.question: What is catastrophic forgetting?
questions.role: Neural network forgets previously learned tasks when trained on new ones

questions.question: Continual learning addresses:
questions.role: Learning new tasks without forgetting old ones

questions.question: What is Elastic Weight Consolidation (EWC)?
questions.role: Prevents catastrophic forgetting by penalizing changes to important weights

questions.question: What is knowledge distillation training?
questions.role: Student network trained to match teacher network's soft probability outputs

questions.question: What is temperature scaling in distillation?
questions.role: Softens teacher's probability distribution to transfer more information

questions.question: What is neural network pruning during training?
questions.role: Removing unnecessary connections while maintaining performance

questions.question: What is lottery ticket hypothesis?
questions.role: Dense networks contain sparse subnetworks ('winning tickets') that train well alone

questions.question: What is progressive resizing in image training?
questions.role: Training on small images first, gradually increasing resolution

questions.question: What is test-time augmentation (TTA)?
questions.role: Averaging predictions over multiple augmented versions of test input

questions.question: What is gradient tape in TensorFlow?
questions.role: Context manager recording operations for automatic differentiation

questions.question: What is autograd in PyTorch?
questions.role: Automatic differentiation engine tracking operations for backprop

questions.question: What is the purpose of optimizer.zero_grad() in PyTorch?
questions.role: Clears accumulated gradients before computing new ones

questions.question: What is loss.backward() in PyTorch?
questions.role: Computes gradients via backpropagation

questions.question: What is optimizer.step() in PyTorch?
questions.role: Updates model parameters using computed gradients

questions.question: What is model.train() vs model.eval() in PyTorch?
questions.role: train(): activates dropout/batch norm; eval(): deactivates them

questions.question: What is torch.no_grad() used for?
questions.role: Disables gradient computation for inference (saves memory)

questions.question: What is validation loss used for during training?
questions.role: Monitor overfitting; guide early stopping; select best model

questions.question: What is model checkpointing?
questions.role: Saving model at best validation performance during training

questions.question: What is early stopping criteria?
questions.role: Validation loss not improving for N consecutive epochs (patience)

questions.question: What is the effect of batch normalization on training?
questions.role: Stabilizes training, allows higher LR, acts as mild regularizer

questions.question: What is layer freezing in fine-tuning?
questions.role: Preventing early layers from updating (keep pre-trained features)

questions.question: What is discriminative fine-tuning?
questions.role: Using different learning rates for different layers (lower for early)

questions.question: What is cyclical fine-tuning?
questions.role: Cycle between training different layer groups with varying LR

questions.question: What is label smoothing and its effect on training?
questions.role: Softens hard labels to prevent overconfidence; improves calibration

questions.question: What is stochastic depth (DropPath)?
questions.role: Randomly drops entire residual blocks during training

questions.question: What is the effect of weight decay (L2) on trained weights?
questions.role: Pulls weights toward zero, preventing large weights

questions.question: What is mini-batch statistics vs population statistics in batch norm?
questions.role: Training uses mini-batch stats; inference uses running stats

questions.question: Variance: Var(X) = ?

questions.question: Standard deviation = ?

questions.question: Bias of an estimator = ?

questions.question: MSE of estimator = Bias² + ?
questions.role: Variance

questions.question: Z-score standardization: z = ?

questions.question: Min-Max normalization: x' = ?

questions.question: Silhouette score: s(i) = ?

questions.question: Adjusted Rand Index (ARI) = ?

questions.question: Support in association rules = ?

questions.question: Confidence in association rules = ?

questions.question: AUC (Area Under ROC) ideal value:

questions.question: ROC curve axes: X=?, Y=?
questions.role: X=FPR (1-Specificity), Y=TPR (Recall/Sensitivity)

questions.question: Precision-Recall AUC is better than ROC AUC when:
questions.role: Dataset is heavily imbalanced

Huber loss: for |y−ŷ| > δ = ?
questions.role: δ|y−ŷ| − 0.5δ²

questions.question: Contrastive loss = ?

questions.question: Focal loss = ?

questions.question: Dice coefficient = ?
IoU (Intersection over Union) = ?
questions.role: Area of Overlap / Area of Union

questions.question: MAP (Mean Average Precision) in detection = ?
questions.role: Mean of AP across all classes

questions.question: OLS solution: β = ?

questions.question: Ridge regression solution: β = ?
questions.role: (XᵀX + λI)⁻¹Xᵀy

SVM margin = ?
SVM optimization: minimize ?
PCA: eigenvalue decomposition of ?

questions.question: Variance explained by PC k = ?
questions.role: λₖ/Σλⱼ (ratio of k-th eigenvalue to sum)

questions.question: K-Means objective: minimize ?

questions.question: EM algorithm: E-step computes ?
questions.role: Expected complete-data log likelihood Q(θ|θ_old)

questions.question: ELBO (Evidence Lower BOund) = ?
questions.role: E[log p(x,z)] − E[log q(z)] (used in VAE)

questions.question: VAE reparameterization: z = ?

questions.role: softmax(QKᵀ/√d_k)V

questions.question: Scaled dot-product attention scaling by ?

questions.question: BLEU score n-gram precision = ?

questions.question: Perplexity = ?

questions.question: Expected Calibration Error (ECE) = ?

questions.question: F1 harmonic mean formula: 2PR/(P+R) vs arithmetic mean (P+R)/2: which is more conservative?
questions.role: Harmonic mean (F1) — punishes large gaps between P and R more

questions.question: Macro-averaging F1:

questions.question: Weighted-averaging F1:
questions.role: Compute F1 per class, weight by number of true instances (support)

questions.question: Cohen's Kappa = ?
questions.role: (Accuracy − Expected_Accuracy)/(1 − Expected_Accuracy)

questions.question: Matthews Correlation Coefficient (MCC) = ?

Xavier initialization variance for layer with n_in, n_out:
questions.role: 2/(n_in + n_out)

questions.question: He initialization variance:
questions.role: 2/n_in

questions.question: After BN normalization, output y = ?
questions.role: γ × x_norm + β (learnable scale γ and shift β)
